TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Steve Blake == Steve Blake sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Steve Blake, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' Washington Wizards (2003‚Äď2005) Kawas tay2003, galan tay 38 lpgan sisyuw na v qu Steve Blake. 5.9 tinsu' wal galun ni Terrell Brandon. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == s~…ēte*e ő≤lake == s~…ēte*e ő≤lake s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, s~…ēte*e ő≤lake, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē was~…ēńßiŇčton wizar*s~…ē (*********) kawas~…ē taj****, …£alan taj ** lp…£an s~…ēis~…ējuw na * qu s~…ēte*e ő≤lake. *.* tins~…ēu Ē wal …£alun ni terrell ő≤ran*on. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: == Steve Blake == Steve Blake sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Steve Blake, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' Washington Wizards (2003‚Äď2005) Kawas tay2003, galan tay 38 lpgan sisyuw na v qu Steve Blake. 5.9 tinsu' wal galun ni Terrell Brandon. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
